title: Verify user can sort and filter a data table

steps.expected: A data table displays with sortable column headers and a filter textbox

steps.action: Type a filter term into the table's search textbox
steps.expected: The table's rows reduce to only those matching the filter term

steps.action: Click the Name column header to sort the table by Name
steps.expected: The table rows reorder alphabetically by Name with a sort indicator on the column

steps.action: Click the Name column header again to reverse the sort direction
steps.expected: The table rows reorder reverse-alphabetically and the sort indicator flips
